<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check all unique colors in the current frame
colors = set()
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    colors.add(n['color'])
print(f"Colors: {sorted(colors)}")

# Check if S squares changed
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        print(f"S square: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check the timer bars
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Row 0: {lines[0]}")
print(f"Row 63: {lines[63]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
